data.title: Guide shares secrets of training 72B models on 128 GPUs, reaching 45-50% utilization with network tuning. Details inside.
data.description: Together.ai has provided insights on training models with 72 billion parameters using 128 GPUs. By implementing proper network tuning and ensuring fault tolerance, they were able to achieve a utilization rate of 45-50%. For more information, visit the full article.

data.title: Curion merges with Blue Yonder Research to expand product insight in US and UK, combining efforts in R&D. Deerfield, Illinois and Leeds, England, Jan 12, 2026. (Character count: 144)
data.description: Curion, a prominent company specializing in revealing the human insights behind products, revealed today that it has merged with Blue Yonder Research, a leading R&D product insight agency based in the U.K. The merging of the two companies took place on January 12, 2026, with Curion headquartered in Deerfield, Illinois, and Blue Yonder Research in Leeds, England. This merger signifies a significant development in the industry, combining their expertise and resources to enhance their capabilities in understanding consumer behavior and product insights.

data.title: CrisisGo introduces "Multi-Team Safety" for schools and public safety on Jan 12, 2026, to coordinate real-time responses.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, on January 12, 2026, a shift from individual school safety measures to collaborative efforts in real-time was announced. Previously, schools operated independently in managing their own safety alerts and response protocols. This new approach aims to promote shared missions in enhancing school safety by coordinating responses across various educational institutions. The initiative marks a departure from the traditional single-player approach and emphasizes real-time collective action.

data.title: AbbVie partners with Trump Admin to enhance access/affordability. $100B for R&D and capital investments in the US.
data.description: AbbVie has announced plans to offer reduced rates for Medicaid services and broaden access to cost-effective treatments directly to patients through TrumpRx. The company is pledging a total of $100 billion towards research and development (R&D) initiatives and capital investments within the United States, focusing on manufacturing expansions. These efforts aim to improve accessibility to crucial medications for the large population of Americans relying on such healthcare solutions.

data.title: Ace Link Armor wins Defence & Security PPE Innovation Award for Thermacore® Heat Dispersion System, recognized by PCIAW.
data.description: Ace Link Armor, a top American company specializing in advanced ballistic protection solutions, has recently received the Defence & Security PPE Innovation Award from the Professional Clothing Industry Association Worldwide (PCIAW®). This prestigious award was given in recognition of Ace Link Armor's revolutionary Thermacore® Heat Dispersion System. The accolade was presented during the 2025 PCIAW PPE Innovation Awards, highlighting outstanding innovation in personal protective equipment. This acknowledgment showcases the exceptional advancements made by Ace Link Armor, emphasizing the company's commitment to developing cutting-edge protective solutions.

data.title: Calif. public self-insured workers’ comp claims declined last year, but losses hit new highs.
data.description: In Oakland, California, a recent study by the California Workers’ Compensation Institute (CWCI) revealed a third consecutive annual decrease in the number and frequency of work injury claims reported by public self-insured employers in the state. Despite this positive trend, the total paid and incurred workers’ compensation losses showed a continued increase. The analysis, based on data from the state Office of Self-Insurance Plans (OSIP), indicated a significant decline in work injury claims for public self-insured employers. OSIP's recent summary of claims experience highlighted this noteworthy development in the industry.

data.title: VeChain's VeBetter platform records 43M sustainability actions with 5M users using 50+ apps to track environmental impact.
data.description: The VeBetter ecosystem from VeChain has recorded over 43 million on-chain verified actions, involving a community of more than 5 million users. These users are actively monitoring the environmental impact across 50+ applications within the ecosystem.

data.title: Fed official suggests no rush for rate cuts, likely to maintain steady interest rates as tensions with Trump escalate.
data.description: There is an expectation that the Federal Reserve will maintain the current interest rates during its upcoming meeting at the end of the month. This decision is anticipated to further fuel the existing tensions with President Trump.

data.title: Elon Musk criticizes Apple-Google AI deal for power concentration, questions Google's control with Android & Chrome.
data.description: CEO of Tesla, Inc. and xAI, Elon Musk, recently criticized the AI partnership between Apple, Inc. and Alphabet, Inc. The partnership, announced on Monday, raised concerns for Musk who questioned the power dynamics involved. He emphasized that Google already owns the Android operating system and Chrome browser, suggesting the partnership could give them too much influence. Musk's comments were shared on social media platform X, sparking a conversation about the potential implications of this collaboration. AAPL stock saw a rise following the announcement of the partnership. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Wilton Manors introduces new EVgo fast charging station, ribbon cutting on Jan 13, 2026 at 6:30 p.m. at City Hall.
data.description: In Wilton Manors, Florida, a ribbon-cutting event is scheduled for the new EVgo electric vehicle fast charging station on January 13, 2026, at 6:30 p.m. The ceremony will take place at Wilton Manors City Hall located at 2020 Wilton Drive. This initiative signifies the city's commitment to sustainable transportation.
